title: Cisco FMC RCE
summary: [P1] CVE-2026-20131 is a remote code execution vulnerability in Cisco Secure Firewall Management Center and Cisco Security Cloud Control Firewall Management, which is being exploited in the wild. No patch is currently available. Why now: This vulnerability is being actively exploited and has a high risk score due to its potential impact on critical infrastructure. (confidence: 0.90)
